response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff full-stack developer with roughly 13-15 years of experience, but the profile is misaligned with a Director-level Principal Engineer role in AI strategy. There is no evidence of AI/ML expertise, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no cloud-platform strategy work, and no track record of advising strategic customers or operating at director-level IC scope. Recent AI exposure is limited to peripheral MCP tooling work.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Active OSS founder (GISCollective) with conference talks and workshops
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products built at scale
No cloud-platform strategy or hyperscaler/enterprise advisory experience
Lacks director-level IC scope, executive influence, or principal-tier impact

key_factors.factor: Missing AI/ML depth and shipped AI products
No cloud platform strategy or strategic customer advisory experience
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal Engineer scope
